output mismatch (see 1505.out.bad)
3a4

7c8,9
< TMP.pmcheck could be activated   pmcd not running
---
> TMP.pmcheck: 44: local: -v: bad variable name
> TMP.pmcheck active              
10c12,13
< TMP.pmcheck could be activated   sample pmda not running
---
> TMP.pmcheck: 44: local: -v: bad variable name
> TMP.pmcheck active              
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
